Description: Reject low-quality or unreadable photos using deterministic local image checks only.

Stories.StoryDescription: Attempt to open candidate photos and reject unreadable or corrupt files safely.
Stories.AcceptanceCriteria: Unreadable image files are marked as corrupt without crashing the pipeline.

Stories.StoryDescription: Compute a deterministic local blur score from grayscale image content.
Stories.AcceptanceCriteria: The module computes a blur metric and rejects images below the configured threshold.

Stories.StoryDescription: Compute brightness and overexposure metrics and reject photos outside acceptable thresholds.
Stories.AcceptanceCriteria: The module rejects overly dark or severely overexposed images using configured thresholds.

Stories.StoryDescription: Return structured quality assessments with metrics and rejection reasons.
Stories.AcceptanceCriteria: Quality results expose acceptance flag, metrics, rejection reasons, and optional error details.

Stories.StoryDescription: Add unit tests for sharp, blurry, dark, and corrupt image cases.
Stories.AcceptanceCriteria: Unit tests cover acceptance and rejection paths for the local quality module.
